title: Provide information on Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander Peoples' cultural practice
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Provide information on Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander Peoples' cultural practice demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Investigate cultural practice

pcs.text: Explore and record local cultural practice from appropriate people within the Community
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Explore and record local cultural practice from appropriate people within the Community?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Explore and record local cultural practice from appropriate people within the Community.

pcs.text: Determine and record local key practices of culture according to cultural protocols and permissions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine and record local key practices of culture according to cultural protocols and permissions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine and record local key practices of culture according to cultural protocols and permissions.

pcs.text: Define the relationship between culture and management of Country and confirm with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define the relationship between culture and management of Country and confirm with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define the relationship between culture and management of Country and confirm with supervisor.

pcs.text: Establish appropriate Cultural Authorities and determine parameters for transferring cultural information
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish appropriate Cultural Authorities and determine parameters for transferring cultural information?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish appropriate Cultural Authorities and determine parameters for transferring cultural information.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Investigate cultural practice

elements.title: Identify locations and patterns of plants and animals in a specific area

pcs.text: Identify and document relationships between on Country management practices and seasonal cycles in an accessible record
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and document relationships between on Country management practices and seasonal cycles in an accessible record?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and document relationships between on Country management practices and seasonal cycles in an accessible record.

pcs.text: Use and document common and/or local Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander names, as appropriate, to describe plants and animals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Use and document common and/or local Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander names, as appropriate, to describe plants and animals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Use and document common and/or local Aboriginal and/or Torres Strait Islander names, as appropriate, to describe plants and animals.

pcs.text: Ensure environmental disturbance is considered and minimised on Country according to organisational procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure environmental disturbance is considered and minimised on Country according to organisational procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure environmental disturbance is considered and minimised on Country according to organisational procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Identify locations and patterns of plants and animals in a specific area

elements.title: Identify plants, animals and resources used for medicine and food

pcs.text: Identify and record bush foods and medicines for a specific area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record bush foods and medicines for a specific area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record bush foods and medicines for a specific area.

pcs.text: Collect and record plant and animal species for future identification using appropriate equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collect and record plant and animal species for future identification using appropriate equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collect and record plant and animal species for future identification using appropriate equipment.

pcs.text: Follow animal welfare requirements when collecting samples
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow animal welfare requirements when collecting samples?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow animal welfare requirements when collecting samples.

pcs.text: Follow work health and safety policies and procedures when working on Country
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow work health and safety policies and procedures when working on Country?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow work health and safety policies and procedures when working on Country.

pcs.text: Define and document issues in relation to access and use of plants, animals and resources, if applicable
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define and document issues in relation to access and use of plants, animals and resources, if applicable?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define and document issues in relation to access and use of plants, animals and resources, if applicable.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Identify plants, animals and resources used for medicine and food

elements.title: Provide information on cultural practice to others

pcs.text: Seek approval by the appropriate Cultural Authorities to pass on general information about cultural practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek approval by the appropriate Cultural Authorities to pass on general information about cultural practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek approval by the appropriate Cultural Authorities to pass on general information about cultural practice.

pcs.text: Provide information to stakeholders who have been given permission by the appropriate Cultural Authorities to learn that knowledge
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide information to stakeholders who have been given permission by the appropriate Cultural Authorities to learn that knowledge?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide information to stakeholders who have been given permission by the appropriate Cultural Authorities to learn that knowledge.

pcs.text: Relate information on cultural practice in an appropriate format and medium
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Relate information on cultural practice in an appropriate format and medium?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Relate information on cultural practice in an appropriate format and medium.

pcs.text: Refer requests for disclosure of information on cultural heritage that infringes on intellectual property rights of a group or Community to appropriate Cultural Authority or local Community members
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Refer requests for disclosure of information on cultural heritage that infringes on intellectual property rights of a group or Community to appropriate Cultural Authority or local Community members?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Refer requests for disclosure of information on cultural heritage that infringes on intellectual property rights of a group or Community to appropriate Cultural Authority or local Community members.

pcs.text: Decline requests for disclosure of information on aspects of cultural practice by unauthorised individuals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Decline requests for disclosure of information on aspects of cultural practice by unauthorised individuals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Decline requests for disclosure of information on aspects of cultural practice by unauthorised individuals.
